December 6–7, 2026
Sydney, Australia

Sponsors

Sponsor ML4H 2026

Sponsoring ML4H 2026 gives your organization visibility with leading researchers and practitioners in machine learning for health, and helps keep the symposium accessible to a broad set of participants.

Become a Sponsor

Support ML4H 2026

Financial support ensures that ML4H remains accessible to a broad set of participants by offsetting the expenses involved in participation. If you are interested, please email us at ml4h@ahli.cc. We follow best practices in other conferences to maintain a transparent and appropriate relationship with our funders:

  1. The substance and structure of the symposium are determined independently by the program committees.
  2. All papers are chosen through a rigorous, mutually anonymous peer review process, where authors disclose conflicts of interest.
  3. All sources of financial support are acknowledged.
  4. Benefits are publicly disclosed below.
  5. Corporate sponsors cannot specify how contributions are spent.

2026 Sponsorship Levels

Sponsorship of the Machine Learning for Health (ML4H) symposium contributes to furthering research and interdisciplinary dialogue around machine learning, health, and biomedicine. We deeply appreciate any amount of support your company or foundation can provide.

Diamond Sponsor

$20,000 USD

Two (2) slots available

Free registration for up to 10 representatives from your organization

Branding

  • Company name listed as “ML4H presented by [company]” on website header
  • Primary placement of company logo on name badges
  • Company logo displayed on website and promotional materials

Presentation and Exhibits

  • Present a 20-minute lunch talk on company's work in machine learning and health research or development or lead a 45-minute research roundtable
  • Dedicated booth (6 ft table or equivalent) throughout the conference

Verbal Recognitions

  • Exclusive acknowledgment to attendees before start of lunch break
  • Verbal acknowledgment of contribution in the opening and closing remarks of the conference and before lunch break

Access to Talent

  • Access to attendee information such as name, email, job title, of those who opt-in for career opportunities
  • Free posting on AHLI job board for one year

Gold Sponsor

$10,000 USD

Five (5) slots available

Free registration for up to 5 representatives from your organization

Branding

  • Company logo displayed on website and promotional materials

Presentations and Exhibits

  • Dedicated booth (6 ft table or equivalent) throughout the conference

Verbal Recognitions

  • Verbal acknowledgment of contribution in the opening and closing remarks of the conference

Access to Talent

  • Access to attendee information such as name, email, job title, of those who opt-in for career opportunities
  • Free posting on AHLI job board for one year

Silver

$5,000 USD

Unlimited slots available

Free registration for up to 2 representatives from your organization

Branding

  • Company logo displayed on website and promotional materials

Verbal Recognition

  • Verbal acknowledgment of contribution in the opening and closing remarks of the conference

Access to Talent

  • Access to attendee information such as name, email, job title, of those who opt-in for career opportunities
  • Free posting on AHLI job board for one year

Academy/Startup

$2,000 USD

Unlimited slots available

Free registration for up to 1 representative from your organization

Branding

  • Company logo displayed on website and promotional materials

Access to Talent

  • Free posting on AHLI job board for one year

Add-Ons — for Silver and Above

  • Research Roundtable (5 slots): +$2,500
    • 1–2 representative(s) at the roundtable
    • Roundtable topic is subject to approval
  • Networking Social (3 slots): +$3,500
  • Best Paper Award (4 slots): +$500
    • $2k for exclusive paper award sponsor
    • Acknowledgement at presentation
  • Best Demo Award (1 slot): +$500
    • Acknowledgement at presentation
  • Best Reviewer Award (1 slot): +$150
    • Acknowledgement at presentation
  • Travel Awards (unlimited slots): +$500 each
    • $12k for exclusive travel award sponsor
    • Sponsor author travel

Bundled Packages

We have additional bundled packages to fund multiple AHLI events.

  • Diamond and Gold Multi-Event Package
    • $25,000 for 2 conferences
    • Approx. 15% discount with $30,000 value
  • Silver Multi-Event Discount Package
    • $16,000 for 4 conferences
    • 20% discount with $20,000 value
  • Gold BOGO 50% Package
    • $15,000 for 2 conferences
    • 25% discount with $20,000 value
    • Buy One Get One 50% Off
  • A La Carte & Custom Package
    • 15% discount with flexible, tailored options combining elements from other packages

Our Sponsors

With thanks to our sponsors

ML4H 2026 is made possible by the generous support of our sponsors. We are grateful for their commitment to advancing machine learning for health.

Sponsor announcements coming soon.

Ready to support ML4H 2026, or have questions about tiers, add-ons, and bundled packages? Email us at ml4h@ahli.cc.
